glossary.subject: Service Record update failed for DNE Order No: {{ mappings.orderNumber }}
glossary.subtitle:
Hello,

{{ mappings.orderType }} order has been assigned to your team at {{mappings.taskName}} step.

NIT team had manually rollback the config, but Service Record Update by Orchestrator API call has been failed.

Order no: {{ mappings.orderNumber }}
Site id: {{ mappings.siteId }}
Step: {{ mappings.taskName }}


Please check order tracking section in {{ mappings.url }} with order number for more information.

Thank You
glossary.footerText: This is an automated email. Please do not reply to this email.
